title: Hybrid Retrieval, Score Calibration, and Rank Fusion
description: A hybrid system adds raw BM25 and cosine scores, gives missing results zero without defining meaning, and wins globally while exact-identifier queries regress. Learners cumulatively produce hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Identify query slices where exact lexical and semantic dense signals complement or conflict instead of assuming hybrid superiority.
Avoid direct raw-score comparison across retrievers unless distributions and meaning are calibrated on target judgments.
Implement reciprocal rank fusion with stable identities, rank constant, duplicate handling, missing candidates, and deterministic ties.
